Certified health coach and private chef bringing Korean heritage, wellness, and hospitality together.

Our Story
"Food has always been at the center of my life."

From my grandmother's table to my father's kitchen wisdom, I learned that cooking is about far more than a meal. It is about connection, heritage, and healing, and it shaped everything I now bring to coaching, private dining, and the way I gather people together.
